assertions.title: Token header with price and change
assertions.reason: Token header shows icon/name/ticker and monospace price, but no 24h percentage change is rendered.

steps.expected: CASH icon/name/ticker, current price, and 24h change percentage (green/red)
steps.observed: CASH icon/name/ticker and $0.000000 shown; no percentage change text found
Price span uses GeistMono via font-mono

assertions.issues: Missing 24h change percentage in token header.

assertions.title: Token stats grid
assertions.reason: Stats grid is present, but Market cap and Total supply remain '--' instead of populated values.

steps.expected: Market Cap, 24h Volume, Total Supply populated from API
steps.observed: 24H volume shows $0.00; Market cap and Total supply show '--'

steps.expected: Contains fields needed to populate all required stats
steps.observed: /market returns pair/price/volume fields only; no marketCap/totalSupply fields

assertions.issues: Required stats are not fully populated in UI.

assertions.title: Price chart renders
assertions.reason: No candle data returned, so line/gradient positivity rendering cannot be validated.

steps.expected: Visible price line with green/red trend and gradient fill
steps.observed: Chart shows 'No chart data available' empty state

assertions.title: Time range selector
assertions.reason: Range controls are visible, active state changes on click, and corresponding candle interval requests are issued.

steps.expected: Active range highlight updates and chart requests corresponding interval data
steps.observed: Pressed state moved across selected ranges; candle requests observed for 15m, 1d, 1m, 1h

assertions.title: Chart hover interaction
assertions.reason: Hover tooltip/crosshair and header hover-price update cannot be validated without candle points.

steps.expected: Crosshair/tooltip appears and header price updates to hovered point
steps.observed: No tooltip/crosshair; header remained at $0.000000 with no-data chart

evidence.network: Candle endpoints returned empty arrays during range tests

assertions.title: Chart loading state
assertions.reason: On reload, chart area did not show a visible chart skeleton/shimmer loading state before empty-state rendering.

steps.action: Reload page and capture immediate chart area
steps.expected: Skeleton/shimmer placeholder appears while chart data is loading
steps.observed: Chart displays no-data panel directly; no explicit chart loading skeleton observed

evidence.network: Chart-related requests complete quickly (200), but no chart loading skeleton observed

assertions.issues: Chart loading placeholder not evident in tested flow.

assertions.title: Chart empty state
assertions.reason: With no candle data, chart shows a graceful empty state message instead of a broken/blank box.

steps.action: View chart when candle responses are empty
steps.observed: No chart data message and placeholder content rendered correctly

blockers.description: Candle endpoints returned empty arrays across tested intervals, preventing validation of rendered line/crosshair hover behaviors.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Switched chart ranges (1W/1Y/1H) and reloaded page; dataset remained empty.
